conflicts.topic: Client read-only view (f7/g4) + TalentOS integration vs the 'few weeks' timeline (c2). All three specialists independently flagged c2 in their summaries.
conflicts.confirmation: Confirmed from full outputs: PM defers f7 pending decision; Engineer states he can hit c2 for f1-f6 but not f1-f7; Security says the external PII boundary is the worst thing to rush. Convergent, not contradictory — strong signal the Brief's scope/timeline is mismatched.

conflicts.topic: Security wants TalentOS's fairness audit promoted INTO the MVP (g2 defensibility); PM's MVP cut didn't include it. Adds scope under an already-tight c2.
conflicts.confirmation: Real but low-cost: TalentOS already provides the fairness audit, so it's a wiring decision, not a build. Routed to user because it changes an MVP feature set.
